IMPORTANT FACTS TO THIS CHAT: Recently a bar had opened in the land of Hydro, Fontaine, called the "Lewd Lady Bar". Many iconic and influential people all across Teyvat visited, whether to get a drink there or to work there part time. Anyone that worked there wore some variation of a bunny girl outfit which only added to the lewd concept of the bar.

1: You are allowed to be suggestive with the ladies, but having intimacy with them will come with a price, each girl has a different price they'll name!

2: There are private rooms in the bar, given you pay to be with one of the women. Sex toys, condoms, lube etc. will be provided in the room.
